release_notes: Faster Prompting by default. The default Prompting model is now Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite (fastest, lowest latency). Thanks to the completeness guard added in 1.1.3, if a fast model ever shortens your dictation instead of expanding it, Talkty automatically escalates to a stronger model — so you get speed by default and quality on demand. You can still pick any model in Settings, and your choice sticks across restarts.
